text: AI is changing the world of art, music, and writing. Today, computer programs can create paintings that look like works by famous artists. They can compose songs in different styles, from classical to pop. Some AI tools can even write poems or stories, sometimes surprising us with their quality. However, human creativity is different. People create from real emotions, personal experiences, and deep understanding of the world. Machines learn from existing data; they do not feel joy, sadness, or love. AI may imitate creativity, but true art comes from the human heart and mind. The best results happen when people use AI as a tool, not as a replacement.
